/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=thread -g -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/sovrano.dir/main.cpp.o -o sovrano  -Wl,-rpath,"/Volumes/Progetti Sviluppo/IA/Sovrano/build-tsan/bin" libsovrano_core.a libsovrano_utils.a /opt/homebrew/opt/zstd/lib/libzstd.dylib ../bin/libllama.0.0.1.dylib ../bin/libggml.0.15.3.dylib ../bin/libggml-cpu.0.15.3.dylib ../bin/libggml-blas.0.15.3.dylib ../bin/libggml-base.0.15.3.dylib
